name: Code Llama 70B Instruct
archDisplay: Dense transformer decoder (Llama 2 base), instruction fine-tuned
note: Instruction-tuned 70B coder; 67.8% HumanEval pass@1 edged out GPT-4's zero-shot score at the time, among the top open coding models in early 2024.
tpsNote: 70B at Q4 (~40GB) exceeds the 4090's 24GB VRAM and requires partial CPU-layer offload; ~18 tok/s reported with most layers on GPU, dropping to 8-15 tok/s under heavier offload.

results.notes: pass@1, zero-shot; article confirms Code Llama 70B Instruct scored 67.8 on HumanEval, 'just ahead of GPT-4 and Gemini Pro for prompts without examples (zero-shot)'

pass@1, Code Llama - Instruct 70B, Table 2 of the Code Llama paper (arXiv 2308.12950v3, updated when the 70B family was released Jan 29 2024). Directly fetched and cross-confirmed via two independent fetches plus corroborating web search; not currently in the corpus (only HumanEval is recorded).

verificationNotes: Confirmed real. Fetched the-decoder.com article directly: it literally states Code Llama 70B Instruct scored 67.8 on HumanEval and edged out GPT-4/Gemini Pro zero-shot — matches the record exactly, kept. Release date, license (Llama 2 Community License Agreement), and 16K context corroborated the same way as the base model via HF card and Meta's blog. No changes.
